diagrams.title: Evolution of Cloud Computing Timeline
diagrams.description: A horizontal timeline diagram showing key milestones in cloud computing history from 1960s mainframe computing to present day, highlighting major events like the launch of AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.
diagrams.purpose: Helps learners understand the chronological progression of cloud computing from early concepts to modern cloud infrastructure, showing how the technology evolved over decades.

diagrams.title: Major Cloud Service Providers Comparison
diagrams.description: A three-column comparison layout showing the top three cloud providers (AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform) with their founding years, key services, and market positioning.
diagrams.purpose: Provides a visual comparison of the three dominant cloud service providers, their origins, and their service offerings to help understand the competitive landscape.

diagrams.title: Cloud Service Models Pyramid
diagrams.description: A hierarchical pyramid diagram showing the three cloud service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) with examples of providers and services at each level, demonstrating the progression from infrastructure to software.
elements: SaaS (Software as a Service) - Top - Examples: Salesforce, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace
PaaS (Platform as a Service) - Middle - Examples: AWS Elastic Beanstalk, Azure App Service
IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) - Bottom - Examples: AWS EC2, Azure Virtual Machines, Google Compute Engine
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates the分层 structure of cloud service models, helping learners understand the differences between IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS and how they relate to traditional computing.
